pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin version to a recent release compatible with Java 21.
Switch compiler configuration from separate source/target to the unified release flag for Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The 'source' and 'target' flags are deprecated in favor of 'release' in newer JDKs; using 'release' ensures correct API usage and module path handling for Java 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade byte-buddy dependency to a version supporting Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of byte-buddy may fail at runtime or compile time due to internal JVM changes in Java 21 (e.g., module encapsulation, removed internal APIs).
